title: MinecartMaxSpeed Attribute
description: Apply minecartMaxSpeed attribute to individual minecart to change its max speed
body:
# MinecartMaxSpeed Attribute [![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-Fabric-lightyellow?logo=data:image/png;base64,)](https://fabricmc.net) [![Client or Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/Enviroment-Client_and_Server-purple)](#) [![MIT License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/No-Eul/MinecartMaxSpeedAttribute)](https://github.com/No-Eul/MinecartMaxSpeedAttribute/blob/main/LICENSE.txt) [![release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/No-Eul/MinecartMaxSpeedAttribute)](https://github.com/No-Eul/MinecartMaxSpeedAttribute/releases/latest)
[![Hits](https://hits.seeyoufarm.com/api/count/incr/badge.svg?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fmod%2Fminecart-max-speed)](https://hits.seeyoufarm.com/api/count/incr/badge.svg?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fmod%2Fminecart-max-speed) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/minecart-max-speed?logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecart-max-speed) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/No-Eul/MinecartMaxSpeedAttribute/total?logo=github)](https://github.com/No-Eul/MinecartMaxSpeedAttribute/releases)
[](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/NoEul) Add `max_speed`, the attribute version of `minecartMaxSpeed` gamerule, to the entire minecart typed entities.
## Requirements * [Minecraft](https://www.minecraft.net) (Game) * [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net) (Loader) * [Minecart Improvements](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Minecart_Improvements) (Data Pack) ## Attributes * `minecart-max-speed:max_speed` - The maximum speed a minecart may reach. If the gamerule allows to control the default base value of an entire minecart entity, this attribute allows to control the values for individual minecart entities. * Default: `8`, Range: `1` ~ `1000` * Applies to: * ![](https://minecraft.wiki/images/EntitySprite_empty-minecart.png) Minecart * ![](https://minecraft.wiki/images/EntitySprite_minecart-chest.png) Minecart with Chest * ![](https://minecraft.wiki//images/EntitySprite_minecart-command-block.png) Minecart with Command Block * ![](https://minecraft.wiki//images/EntitySprite_minecart-furnace.png) Minecart with Furnace * ![](https://minecraft.wiki//images/EntitySprite_minecart-hopper.png) Minecart with Hopper * ![](https://minecraft.wiki//images/EntitySprite_minecart-monster-spawner.png) Minecart with Monster Spawner
* ![](https://minecraft.wiki//images/EntitySprite_minecart-tnt.png) Minecart with TNT * The base value of each entity is `8` ## Notes * The mod file name indicates the mod name, loader and version: * `(mod name)-(mod loader)-(mod version)+mc(built minecraft version).jar` * For example: `FabricModTemplate-fabric-1.0+mc1.21.jar`
